'''鈭歴-sh-g-ch''' ('''kasashgechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weed|weed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-g-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weed|weed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-sh-g-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kasashgechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisashgechoko|thisashgechoko]] || [[word:jisashgechoko|jisashgechoko]] || [[word:shisashgechoko|shisashgechoko]] || [[word:kisashgechoko|kisashgechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusashgechoko|thuthusashgechoko]] || [[word:jujusashgechoko|jujusashgechoko]] || [[word:shushusashgechoko|shushusashgechoko]] || [[word:kukusashgechoko|kukusashgechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
